```asm
;==============================================================================
; RawrXD QuadBuffer DMA Orchestrator
; Pure MASM x64 Implementation - Zero Dependencies
; 4x1GB Sliding Window with YTFN_SENTINEL Trap Mechanism
;==============================================================================

OPTION CASEMAP:NONE
OPTION WIN64:3

;==============================================================================
; INCLUDES
;==============================================================================
INCLUDELIB kernel32.lib
INCLUDELIB user32.lib
INCLUDELIB gdi32.lib
INCLUDELIB advapi32.lib

;==============================================================================
; EXTERNAL FUNCTIONS
;==============================================================================
EXTERNDEF __imp_CreateFileW:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_ReadFile:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_WriteFile:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_CloseHandle:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_SetFilePointerEx:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_GetFileSizeEx:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_CreateIoCompletionPort:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_GetQueuedCompletionStatus:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_PostQueuedCompletionStatus:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_VirtualAlloc:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_VirtualFree:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_VirtualLock:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_CreateEventW:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_SetEvent:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_WaitForSingleObject:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_InitializeSRWLock:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_AcquireSRWLockShared:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_ReleaseSRWLockShared:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_QueryPerformanceCounter:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_QueryPerformanceFrequency:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_GetCurrentThreadId:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_GetSystemInfo:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_RtlCaptureContext:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_RtlVirtualUnwind:QWORD
EXTERNDEF __imp_SetUnhandledExceptionFilter:QWORD

;==============================================================================
; CONSTANTS
;==============================================================================
QB_SLOT_COUNT           EQU 4
QB_SLOT_SIZE            EQU (1 SHL 30)        ; 1GB
QB_TOTAL_BUFFER_SIZE    EQU (QB_SLOT_COUNT * QB_SLOT_SIZE)
QB_SECTOR_SIZE          EQU 4096               ; For Direct I/O alignment
QB_ALIGNMENT            EQU 65536              ; 64KB allocation granularity

; YTFN_SENTINEL - Magic value indicating page not resident
; 0x7FFF'FFFF'FFFF'FF00 + layer_index (last 8 bits)
YTFN_SENTINEL_BASE      EQU 07FFFFFFFFFFFFF00h

; Slot states
STATE_EMPTY             EQU 0
STATE_LOADING           EQU 1
STATE_READY             EQU 2
STATE_COMPUTING         EQU 3
STATE_DIRTY             EQU 4

; IOCP completion keys
IOCP_KEY_READ_COMPLETE  EQU 1
IOCP_KEY_WRITE_COMPLETE EQU 2
IOCP_KEY_GPU_COMPLETE   EQU 3
IOCP_KEY_SHUTDOWN       EQU 0FFFFFFFFh

; Error codes
QB_SUCCESS              EQU 0
QB_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM  EQU 80070057h          ; E_INVALIDARG
QB_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY  EQU 8007000Eh          ; E_OUTOFMEMORY
QB_ERROR_IO_PENDING     EQU 800703E5h          ; ERROR_IO_PENDING
QB_ERROR_HANDLE_EOF     EQU 80070026h          ; ERROR_HANDLE_EOF
QB_ERROR_VECTORED_EH    EQU 0C0000005h         ; Access violation

;==============================================================================
; STRUCTURES
;==============================================================================
; OVERLAPPED extended for our use
QB_OVERLAPPED STRUCT
    Internal            QWORD ?                 ; OS use
    InternalHigh        QWORD ?                 ; OS use
    Offset              QWORD ?                 ; File position
    OffsetHigh          QWORD ?                 ; File position high
    hEvent              QWORD ?                 ; Event handle
    ; Extended fields
    LayerIndex          DWORD ?                 ; Which layer this I/O is for
    SlotIndex           DWORD ?                 ; Which buffer slot
    OperationType       DWORD ?                 ; READ/WRITE
    RequestTimestamp    QWORD ?                 ; QPC value for latency tracking
QB_OVERLAPPED ENDS

; Buffer slot descriptor
QB_SLOT STRUCT
    State               DWORD ?                 ; STATE_*
    LayerIndex          DWORD ?                 ; Which layer currently loaded (-1 if empty)
    HostAddress         QWORD ?                 ; Virtual address in process space
    DeviceAddress       QWORD ?                 ; GPU-visible address (BAR mapping)
    PendingOperations   DWORD ?                 ; Count of in-flight I/O
    AccessCount         QWORD ?                 ; Statistics
    LastAccessTime      QWORD ?                 ; QPC timestamp
    LoadStartTime       QWORD ?                 ; For latency measurement
    
    ; Synchronization
    StateLock           SRWLOCK <>              ; Protects state transitions
    
    ; I/O tracking
    CurrentOverlapped   QB_OVERLAPPED <>        ; Active operation
QB_SLOT ENDS

; QuadBuffer instance
QB_INSTANCE STRUCT
    ; File handle
    hModelFile          QWORD ?                 ; HANDLE to model file
    FileSize            QWORD ?                 ; Total file size
    LayerSize           QWORD ?                 ; Size of each layer
    LayerCount          DWORD ?                 ; Total layers in model
    CurrentLayer        DWORD ?                 ; Currently computing layer
    
    ; IOCP
    hIOCP               QWORD ?                 ; I/O completion port handle
    hShutdownEvent      QWORD ?                 ; Signal I/O threads to exit
    hIOThread           QWORD ?                 ; Background I/O thread handle
    IOThreadID          DWORD ?                 ; Thread ID for debugging
    
    ; Buffer management
    Slots               QB_SLOT QB_SLOT_COUNT DUP (<>)
    HostBaseAddress     QWORD ?                 ; Base of allocated region
    DeviceBaseAddress   QWORD ?                 ; GPU BAR base (if zero-copy)
    
    ; VRAM management (for GPU-side buffers)
    VRAMBase            QWORD ?                 ; GPU memory base address
    VRAMSize            QWORD ?                 ; Total VRAM allocated
    
    ; Statistics
    StatsLock           SRWLOCK <>
    TotalReads          QWORD ?
    TotalBytesRead      QWORD ?
    TotalLatencyNs      QWORD ?                 ; Cumulative latency
    TrapCount           QWORD ?                 ; YTFN_SENTINEL hits
    CacheHits           QWORD ?                 ; Layer already resident
    
    ; Performance counters
    QPFrequency         QWORD ?                 ; QueryPerformanceFrequency
    
    ; GPU callback
    GPUCompleteCallback QWORD ?                 ; Function pointer
    GPUCallbackContext  QWORD ?                 ; User data
    
    ; State
    Initialized         DWORD ?
    ShutdownRequested   DWORD ?
QB_INSTANCE ENDS

; Layer mapping entry (for reverse lookup)
LAYER_MAPPING STRUCT
    SlotIndex           DWORD ?                 ; Which slot holds this layer (-1 = not resident)
    Resident            DWORD ?                 ; Boolean
    LastAccessTick      QWORD ?                 ; For LRU
LAYER_MAPPING ENDS

;==============================================================================
; DATA SECTION
;==============================================================================
.DATA
    ; Global singleton for exception handling
    g_QBInstance        QWORD 0                 ; Current active instance
    g_OldExceptionFilter QWORD 0                ; Previous unhandled exception filter
    
    ; Error message strings
    szErrInvalidParam   BYTE "Invalid parameter", 0
    szErrOutOfMemory    BYTE "Out of memory", 0
    szErrFileOpen       BYTE "Failed to open model file", 0
    szErrIOCP           BYTE "Failed to create IOCP", 0
    szErrAlignment      BYTE "Buffer alignment failed", 0

;==============================================================================
; CODE SECTION
;==============================================================================
.CODE

;==============================================================================
; HELPER: AlignUp
; Align value up to alignment boundary
; RCX = value, RDX = alignment
; Returns RAX = aligned value
;==============================================================================
AlignUp PROC
    mov rax, rcx
    add rax, rdx
    dec rax
    not rdx
    and rax, rdx
    ret
AlignUp ENDP

;==============================================================================
; HELPER: IsPowerOfTwo
; Check if value is power of two
; RCX = value
; Returns RAX = 1 if power of two, 0 otherwise
;==============================================================================
IsPowerOfTwo PROC
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @F
    mov rax, rcx
    dec rax
    test rax, rcx
    setz al
    movzx rax, al
    ret
@@:
    xor rax, rax
    ret
IsPowerOfTwo ENDP

;==============================================================================
; HELPER: GetCurrentTimestamp
; Get high-resolution timestamp
; Returns RAX = QPC value
;==============================================================================
GetCurrentTimestamp PROC
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 8
    
    lea rcx, [rsp+8]            ; Address to store result
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_QueryPerformanceCounter]
    
    mov rax, [rsp+8]
    
    add rsp, 8
    pop rbx
    ret
GetCurrentTimestamp ENDP

;==============================================================================
; YTFN_SENTINEL TRAP HANDLER
; This is the core innovation - intercepts GPU accesses to non-resident pages
;==============================================================================
YTFN_SENTINEL_Handler PROC FRAME
    ; Save all registers (X64 calling convention)
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rsi
    .pushreg rsi
    push rdi
    .pushreg rdi
    push rbp
    .pushreg rbp
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 128                ; Allocate shadow space + alignment
    .allocstack 128
    
    .endprolog
    
    ; RCX = exception pointers (PEXCEPTION_POINTERS)
    mov rbx, rcx                ; Save exception pointers
    
    ; Check if this is an access violation
    mov rax, [rcx]              ; ExceptionRecord
    mov ecx, [rax]              ; ExceptionCode
    cmp ecx, QB_ERROR_VECTORED_EH
    jne NotOurException
    
    ; Check if exception address matches YTFN_SENTINEL pattern
    mov rax, [rax+18h]          ; ExceptionAddress
    mov rdx, YTFN_SENTINEL_BASE
    and rax, 0FFFFFFFFFFFFF00h  ; Mask lower 8 bits
    cmp rax, rdx
    jne NotOurException
    
    ; Extract layer index from lower 8 bits of faulting address
    mov rax, [rbx]              ; ExceptionRecord
    mov rax, [rax+18h]          ; ExceptionAddress
    and rax, 0FFh               ; Layer index (0-255, extendable)
    mov r12d, eax               ; R12 = requested layer
    
    ; Get instance pointer
    mov r13, g_QBInstance
    test r13, r13
    jz NotOurException          ; No active instance
    
    ; Increment trap counter
    lea rcx, [r13+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.StatsLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    inc QWORD PTR [r13+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.TrapCount]
    
    lea rcx, [r13+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.StatsLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; CRITICAL: Stall GPU until layer is resident
    ; This is the "trap" - we block here synchronously
    mov ecx, r12d               ; Layer index
    mov rdx, r13                ; Instance
    call QuadBuffer_StallForLayer
    
    ; Modify exception context to return valid address
    mov rax, [rbx+8]            ; ContextRecord
    ; RAX in context = valid VRAM pointer now
    mov rcx, [r13+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.VRAMBase]
    mov [rax+78h], rcx          ; Set RAX in context (x64 RAX offset)
    
    ; Continue execution
    mov eax, EXCEPTION_CONTINUE_EXECUTION  ; -1
    jmp HandlerExit
    
NotOurException:
    ; Chain to previous handler
    xor eax, eax                ; EXCEPTION_CONTINUE_SEARCH
    
HandlerExit:
    add rsp, 128
    pop rbx
    pop rbp
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
YTFN_SENTINEL_Handler ENDP

;==============================================================================
; QuadBuffer_StallForLayer
; Synchronously load a layer and block until ready
; ECX = layer index, RDX = instance pointer
; Returns RAX = VRAM pointer (valid GPU address)
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_StallForLayer PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rsi
    .pushreg rsi
    push rdi
    .pushreg rdi
    push rbp
    .pushreg rbp
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 128
    .allocstack 128
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12d, ecx               ; R12 = layer index
    mov r13, rdx                ; R13 = instance
    xor r14, r14                ; R14 = target slot (to be determined)
    
    ; Step 1: Check if layer already resident (race condition check)
    mov ecx, r12d
    mov rdx, r13
    call QuadBuffer_FindLayerSlot
    test rax, rax
    js LayerNotResident         ; SF set if not found
    
    ; Layer already resident - mark as computing and return
    mov r14d, eax               ; Slot index
    jmp MarkComputingAndReturn
    
LayerNotResident:
    ; Step 2: Select victim slot for eviction (LRU policy)
    mov rcx, r13
    call QuadBuffer_SelectVictimSlot
    mov r14d, eax               ; R14 = victim slot index
    
    ; Step 3: Evict current occupant if any
    mov rcx, r13
    mov edx, r14d
    call QuadBuffer_EvictSlot
    
    ; Step 4: Initiate async load of new layer
    mov rcx, r13
    mov edx, r14d
    mov r8d, r12d
    call QuadBuffer_InitiateLayerLoad
    
    ; Step 5: BLOCK until load completes (synchronous stall)
    mov rcx, r13
    mov edx, r14d
    call QuadBuffer_WaitForSlotReady
    
    ; Step 6: Return valid GPU pointer
MarkComputingAndReturn:
    ; Get slot pointer
    mov eax, r14d
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea r15, [r13+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add r15, rax                ; R15 = slot pointer
    
    ; Mark as computing
    lea rcx, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov DWORD PTR [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_COMPUTING
    
    lea rcx, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Update layer mapping
    mov rcx, r13
    mov edx, r12d
    mov r8d, r14d
    call QuadBuffer_UpdateLayerMapping
    
    ; Return device address
    mov rax, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.DeviceAddress]
    
    add rsp, 128
    pop rbx
    pop rbp
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
QuadBuffer_StallForLayer ENDP

;==============================================================================
; QuadBuffer_FindLayerSlot
; Find which slot contains a given layer
; ECX = layer index, RDX = instance
; Returns RAX = slot index, or -1 if not resident
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_FindLayerSlot PROC
    mov r8, rdx                 ; R8 = instance
    xor eax, eax                ; Slot counter
    
SlotLoop:
    cmp eax, QB_SLOT_COUNT
    jge NotFound
    
    ; Calculate slot address
    push rax
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea r9, [r8+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add r9, rax
    pop rax
    
    ; Check if this slot has our layer
    cmp DWORD PTR [r9+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LayerIndex], ecx
    jne NextSlot
    
    ; Check state is READY or COMPUTING
    mov r10d, [r9+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State]
    cmp r10d, STATE_READY
    je Found
    cmp r10d, STATE_COMPUTING
    je Found
    
NextSlot:
    inc eax
    jmp SlotLoop
    
Found:
    ; Return slot index
    ret
    
NotFound:
    mov rax, -1
    or rax, rax                 ; Set SF to indicate not found
    ret
QuadBuffer_FindLayerSlot ENDP

;==============================================================================
; QuadBuffer_SelectVictimSlot
; Select slot to evict using LRU policy
; RCX = instance
; Returns RAX = slot index (0-3)
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_SelectVictimSlot PROC
    mov r8, rcx                 ; R8 = instance
    xor r9d, r9d                ; Best slot index
    mov r10, -1                 ; Best timestamp (oldest)
    xor eax, eax                ; Current slot
    
SelectLoop:
    cmp eax, QB_SLOT_COUNT
    jge DoneSelecting
    
    ; Get slot address
    push rax
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea r11, [r8+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add r11, rax
    pop rax
    
    ; Skip slots that are EMPTY or LOADING
    mov ecx, [r11+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State]
    cmp ecx, STATE_EMPTY
    je UseThisSlot              ; Empty slot is perfect
    cmp ecx, STATE_LOADING
    je SkipSlot                 ; Can't evict loading slot
    
    ; Check if computing (higher cost to evict, but possible)
    cmp ecx, STATE_COMPUTING
    je CheckTimestamp
    
    ; For READY state, check LRU
    jmp CheckTimestamp
    
CheckTimestamp:
    mov rcx, [r11+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LastAccessTime]
    cmp rcx, r10
    jae SkipSlot                ; Not older than current best
    
    ; New best
    mov r10, rcx
    mov r9d, eax
    
SkipSlot:
    inc eax
    jmp SelectLoop
    
UseThisSlot:
    ; Found empty slot, use immediately
    mov r9d, eax
    jmp DoneSelecting
    
DoneSelecting:
    mov eax, r9d
    ret
QuadBuffer_SelectVictimSlot ENDP

;==============================================================================
; QuadBuffer_EvictSlot
; Evict current contents of a slot
; RCX = instance, EDX = slot index
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_EvictSlot PROC FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    mov r13d, edx               ; R13 = slot index
    
    ; Get slot pointer
    mov eax, r13d
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea rbx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add rbx, rax                ; RBX = slot
    
    ; Acquire exclusive lock
    lea rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Check current state
    mov eax, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State]
    cmp eax, STATE_EMPTY
    je @F                       ; Already empty, nothing to do
    
    ; If computing, wait for GPU to finish (cooperative)
    cmp eax, STATE_COMPUTING
    jne CheckReady
    
    ; Signal GPU to complete (callback mechanism)
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.GPUCompleteCallback]
    test rcx, rcx
    jz ForceEvict               ; No callback, force eviction
    
    mov rdx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.GPUCallbackContext]
    mov r8d, r13d
    call rcx                    ; Call GPU complete callback
    
ForceEvict:
    ; Fall through to eviction
    
CheckReady:
    cmp eax, STATE_READY
    je DoEvict
    cmp eax, STATE_DIRTY
    je WriteBack                ; Need to write back to disk
    
    ; Loading state - cancel I/O
    cmp eax, STATE_LOADING
    je CancelIO
    
    jmp EvictDone
    
WriteBack:
    ; TODO: Implement write-back for modified layers
    ; For now, just discard (models are read-only in v1.0)
    
CancelIO:
    ; Cancel pending I/O
    lea rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.CurrentOverlapped]
    mov rdx, r12
    mov r8d, r13d
    call QuadBuffer_CancelSlotIO
    
DoEvict:
    ; Clear layer mapping
    mov ecx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LayerIndex]
    cmp ecx, -1
    je @F
    
    mov rdx, r12
    call QuadBuffer_ClearLayerMapping
    
@@:
    ; Reset slot state
    mov DWORD PTR [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_EMPTY
    mov DWORD PTR [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LayerIndex], -1
    mov QWORD PTR [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LastAccessTime], 0
    
EvictDone:
    lea rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    add rsp, 40
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
QuadBuffer_EvictSlot ENDP

;==============================================================================
; QuadBuffer_InitiateLayerLoad
; Start async I/O to load layer into slot
; RCX = instance, EDX = slot index, R8D = layer index
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_InitiateLayerLoad PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 88                 ; Shadow space + OVERLAPPED
    .allocstack 88
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    mov r13d, edx               ; R13 = slot index
    mov r14d, r8d               ; R14 = layer index
    
    ; Get slot pointer
    mov eax, r13d
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea r15, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add r15, rax                ; R15 = slot
    
    ; Mark slot as loading
    lea rcx, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov DWORD PTR [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_LOADING
    mov DWORD PTR [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LayerIndex], r14d
    
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LoadStartTime], rax
    
    lea rcx, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Calculate file offset for this layer
    mov rax, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.LayerSize]
    mul r14                     ; RAX = layer index * layer size
    
    ; Setup OVERLAPPED structure (on stack)
    lea rbx, [rsp+40]           ; RBX = OVERLAPPED address
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov rdx, SIZEOF QB_OVERLAPPED
    xor r8, r8
    call memset                 ; Zero initialize
    
    mov [rbx+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.Offset], rax  ; File offset low
    mov [rbx+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.LayerIndex], r14d
    mov [rbx+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.SlotIndex], r13d
    mov DWORD PTR [rbx+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.OperationType], 1  ; READ
    
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov [rbx+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.RequestTimestamp], rax
    
    ; Get host address for this slot
    mov rax, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.HostAddress]
    
    ; Initiate async read
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hModelFile]  ; hFile
    mov rdx, rax                                    ; lpBuffer
    mov r8, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.LayerSize]      ; nNumberOfBytesToRead
    lea r9, [rsp+80]                                ; lpNumberOfBytesRead (unused for async)
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], rbx                     ; lpOverlapped
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReadFile]
    
    test eax, eax
    jnz ReadCompletedSynchronously
    
    ; Check for pending
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_GetLastError]
    cmp eax, ERROR_IO_PENDING
    je ReadPending              ; Normal async case
    
    ; Error
    jmp LoadFailed
    
ReadCompletedSynchronously:
    ; Synchronous completion - still post to IOCP for unified handling
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOCP]
    mov rdx, IOCP_KEY_READ_COMPLETE
    mov r8, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.LayerSize]  ; Bytes transferred
    mov r9, rbx                                 ; OVERLAPPED
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_PostQueuedCompletionStatus]
    
ReadPending:
    ; Success - I/O is now in flight
    xor eax, eax                ; Return success
    jmp LoadExit
    
LoadFailed:
    ; Mark slot as empty on failure
    lea rcx, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov DWORD PTR [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_EMPTY
    mov DWORD PTR [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LayerIndex], -1
    
    lea rcx, [r15+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov eax, QB_ERROR_IO_PENDING
    
LoadExit:
    add rsp, 88
    pop rbx
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
QuadBuffer_InitiateLayerLoad ENDP

;==============================================================================
; QuadBuffer_WaitForSlotReady
; Block until slot transitions to READY state
; RCX = instance, EDX = slot index
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_WaitForSlotReady PROC FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    mov r13d, edx               ; R13 = slot index
    
    ; Get slot pointer
    mov eax, r13d
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea rbx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add rbx, rax                ; RBX = slot
    
WaitLoop:
    ; Check state with shared lock
    lea rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockShared]
    
    mov eax, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State]
    
    lea rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockShared]
    
    cmp eax, STATE_READY
    je DoneWaiting
    
    cmp eax, STATE_EMPTY
    je LoadFailed               ; Load failed/cancelled
    
    ; Still loading - yield and retry
    mov ecx, 1                  ; Yield processor
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_Sleep] ; Actually call Sleep(1) for now
    
    jmp WaitLoop
    
LoadFailed:
    mov rax, -1                 ; Error indicator
    
DoneWaiting:
    add rsp, 40
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
QuadBuffer_WaitForSlotReady ENDP

;==============================================================================
; IOCP Worker Thread
; Background thread processing I/O completions
;==============================================================================
QB_IOCP_Worker PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 72
    .allocstack 72
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    
WorkerLoop:
    ; Get completion status
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOCP]
    lea rdx, [rsp+40]           ; lpNumberOfBytesTransferred
    lea r8, [rsp+48]            ; lpCompletionKey
    lea r9, [rsp+56]            ; lpOverlapped
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], INFINITE  ; dwMilliseconds
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_GetQueuedCompletionStatus]
    
    test eax, eax
    jnz ProcessCompletion
    
    ; Check for timeout or error
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_GetLastError]
    cmp eax, ERROR_ABANDONED_WAIT_0
    je WorkerExit               ; IOCP closed
    
    ; Real error - log and continue
    jmp WorkerLoop
    
ProcessCompletion:
    mov rbx, [rsp+56]           ; RBX = OVERLAPPED
    mov r13, [rsp+48]           ; R13 = completion key
    
    cmp r13d, IOCP_KEY_SHUTDOWN
    je WorkerExit
    
    cmp r13d, IOCP_KEY_READ_COMPLETE
    je HandleReadComplete
    
    cmp r13d, IOCP_KEY_GPU_COMPLETE
    je HandleGPUComplete
    
    ; Unknown key - skip
    jmp WorkerLoop
    
HandleReadComplete:
    ; Process read completion
    mov rcx, r12
    mov rdx, rbx
    call QuadBuffer_HandleReadComplete
    jmp WorkerLoop
    
HandleGPUComplete:
    ; Process GPU completion notification
    mov rcx, r12
    mov rdx, rbx
    call QuadBuffer_HandleGPUComplete
    jmp WorkerLoop
    
WorkerExit:
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 72
    pop rbx
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
QB_IOCP_Worker ENDP

;==============================================================================
; QuadBuffer_HandleReadComplete
; Process completed async read
; RCX = instance, RDX = OVERLAPPED
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_HandleReadComplete PROC FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    mov rbx, rdx                ; RBX = OVERLAPPED
    
    ; Get slot info
    mov r13d, [rbx+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.SlotIndex]
    
    ; Get slot pointer
    mov eax, r13d
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea r8, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add r8, rax                 ; R8 = slot
    
    ; Calculate latency
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    sub rax, [rbx+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.RequestTimestamp]
    
    ; Update statistics
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.StatsLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    inc QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.TotalReads]
    mov rcx, [rsp+48]           ; Number of bytes transferred
    add [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.TotalBytesRead], rcx
    
    ; Convert QPC to nanoseconds and add to total
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.QPFrequency]
    xchg rax, rdx
    mov rax, 1000000000         ; Nanoseconds per second
    mul rdx
    div rcx
    add [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.TotalLatencyNs], rax
    
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.StatsLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Mark slot as READY
    lea rcx, [r8+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov DWORD PTR [r8+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_READY
    
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov [r8+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LastAccessTime], rax
    
    dec DWORD PTR [r8+OFFSET QB_SLOT.PendingOperations]
    
    lea rcx, [r8+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Signal any waiters
    ; (In production, use an event per slot)
    
    add rsp, 40
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
QuadBuffer_HandleReadComplete ENDP

;==============================================================================
; PUBLIC API: QuadBuffer_Create
; Create new QuadBuffer instance
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_Create PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    ; Allocate instance memory
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_INSTANCE
    mov rdx, MEM_COMMIT or MEM_RESERVE
    mov r8, PAGE_READWRITE
    xor r9, r9
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_VirtualAlloc]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz CreateFailed
    
    mov r12, rax                ; R12 = instance
    
    ; Zero initialize
    mov rcx, r12
    mov rdx, SIZEOF QB_INSTANCE
    xor r8, r8
    call memset
    
    ; Initialize locks
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.StatsLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_InitializeSRWLock]
    
    ; Initialize slot locks
    xor ebx, ebx
InitSlotLocks:
    cmp ebx, QB_SLOT_COUNT
    jge LocksDone
    
    mov eax, ebx
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add rcx, rax
    add rcx, OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_InitializeSRWLock]
    
    inc ebx
    jmp InitSlotLocks
    
LocksDone:
    ; Initialize layer indices to -1
    xor ebx, ebx
InitLayerIndices:
    cmp ebx, QB_SLOT_COUNT
    jge IndicesDone
    
    mov eax, ebx
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add rcx, rax
    mov DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LayerIndex], -1
    
    inc ebx
    jmp InitLayerIndices
    
IndicesDone:
    ; Get QPFrequency
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.QPFrequency]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_QueryPerformanceFrequency]
    
    ; Set initialized flag
    mov DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Initialized], 1
    
    ; Return instance handle
    mov rax, r12
    
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
    
CreateFailed:
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
QuadBuffer_Create ENDP

;==============================================================================
; PUBLIC API: INFINITY_InitializeStream
; Initialize streaming from model file
;==============================================================================
INFINITY_InitializeStream PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 120                ; Shadow + local variables + UNICODE_STRING
    .allocstack 120
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    mov r13, rdx                ; R13 = model path (UNICODE)
    mov r14, r8                 ; R14 = layer size
    mov r15d, r9d               ; R15 = layer count (from stack)
    
    ; Validate parameters
    test r12, r12
    jz InvalidParam
    test r13, r13
    jz InvalidParam
    test r14, r14
    jz InvalidParam
    test r15d, r15d
    jz InvalidParam
    
    ; Check initialization
    cmp DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Initialized], 1
    jne InvalidParam
    
    ; Store parameters
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.LayerSize], r14
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.LayerCount], r15d
    
    ; Open model file with Direct I/O (no buffering)
    mov rcx, r13                ; lpFileName
    mov rdx, GENERIC_READ
    mov r8, FILE_SHARE_READ
    xor r9, r9                  ; lpSecurityAttributes
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], OPEN_EXISTING
    mov rax, FILE_FLAG_NO_BUFFERING or FILE_FLAG_OVERLAPPED or FILE_FLAG_SEQUENTIAL_SCAN
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+40], rax
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+48], 0   ; hTemplateFile
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateFileW]
    
    cmp rax, INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
    je FileOpenFailed
    
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hModelFile], rax
    
    ; Get file size
    mov rcx, rax
    lea rdx, [rsp+64]           ; LARGE_INTEGER for file size
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_GetFileSizeEx]
    
    test eax, eax
    jz FileSizeFailed
    
    mov rax, [rsp+64]
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.FileSize], rax
    
    ; Create IOCP
    xor ecx, ecx                ; Existing file handle (none)
    xor edx, edx                ; Existing IOCP (none)
    xor r8d, r8d                ; CompletionKey (unused)
    xor r9d, r9d                ; NumberOfConcurrentThreads (0 = default)
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateIoCompletionPort]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz IOCPCreateFailed
    
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOCP], rax
    
    ; Associate file with IOCP
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hModelFile]
    mov rdx, rax
    mov r8d, IOCP_KEY_READ_COMPLETE
    xor r9d, r9d
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateIoCompletionPort]
    
    ; Allocate aligned host memory for slots
    ; Must be sector-aligned for Direct I/O
    mov rcx, QB_TOTAL_BUFFER_SIZE + QB_SECTOR_SIZE  ; Extra for alignment
    mov rdx, MEM_COMMIT or MEM_RESERVE
    mov r8, PAGE_READWRITE
    xor r9, r9
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_VirtualAlloc]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz BufferAllocFailed
    
    ; Align to sector boundary
    mov rbx, rax
    add rbx, QB_SECTOR_SIZE - 1
    and rbx, NOT (QB_SECTOR_SIZE - 1)
    
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.HostBaseAddress], rbx
    
    ; Lock pages in physical memory (prevent swapping)
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov rdx, QB_TOTAL_BUFFER_SIZE
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_VirtualLock]
    
    ; Setup slot addresses
    xor ecx, ecx                ; Slot index
SetupSlots:
    cmp ecx, QB_SLOT_COUNT
    jge SlotsDone
    
    mov eax, ecx
    mov r8, QB_SLOT_SIZE
    mul r8                      ; RAX = slot offset
    
    mov r9, rbx
    add r9, rax                 ; R9 = host address for this slot
    
    ; Store in slot descriptor
    push rcx
    mov rax, rcx
    mov rcx, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul rcx
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add rcx, rax
    
    mov [rcx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.HostAddress], r9
    mov DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_EMPTY
    mov DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LayerIndex], -1
    
    pop rcx
    inc ecx
    jmp SetupSlots
    
SlotsDone:
    ; Create shutdown event
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx
    xor r8d, r8d
    xor r9d, r9d
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateEventW]
    
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hShutdownEvent], rax
    
    ; Start I/O worker thread
    xor ecx, ecx                ; lpThreadAttributes
    xor edx, edx                ; dwStackSize
    lea r8, QB_IOCP_Worker      ; lpStartAddress
    mov r9, r12                 ; lpParameter
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], 0   ; dwCreationFlags
    lea rax, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.IOThreadID]
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+40], rax ; lpThreadId
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateThread]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz ThreadCreateFailed
    
    mov [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOThread], rax
    
    ; Install YTFN_SENTINEL exception handler
    lea rcx, YTFN_SENTINEL_Handler
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_SetUnhandledExceptionFilter]
    
    mov g_OldExceptionFilter, rax
    mov g_QBInstance, r12
    
    ; Success
    xor eax, eax                ; QB_SUCCESS
    jmp InitExit
    
InvalidParam:
    mov eax, QB_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM
    jmp InitExit
    
FileOpenFailed:
    mov eax, QB_ERROR_IO_PENDING
    jmp InitExit
    
FileSizeFailed:
    mov eax, QB_ERROR_IO_PENDING
    jmp CleanupFile
    
IOCPCreateFailed:
    mov eax, QB_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY
    jmp CleanupFile
    
BufferAllocFailed:
    mov eax, QB_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY
    jmp CleanupIOCP
    
ThreadCreateFailed:
    mov eax, QB_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY
    jmp CleanupBuffer
    
CleanupBuffer:
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.HostBaseAddress]
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, MEM_RELEASE
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_VirtualFree]
    
CleanupIOCP:
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOCP]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
CleanupFile:
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hModelFile]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    ; Mark as uninitialized
    mov DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Initialized], 0
    
InitExit:
    add rsp, 120
    pop rbx
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
INFINITY_InitializeStream ENDP

;==============================================================================
; PUBLIC API: QuadBuffer_GetLayerPtr
; Get GPU-accessible pointer for layer (triggers YTFN_SENTINEL if not resident)
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_GetLayerPtr PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    mov ebx, edx                ; EBX = layer index
    
    ; Validate
    test r12, r12
    jz InvalidParam2
    cmp ebx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.LayerCount]
    jae InvalidParam2
    
    ; Check if already resident
    mov ecx, ebx
    mov rdx, r12
    call QuadBuffer_FindLayerSlot
    
    test rax, rax
    js NotResident              ; Not resident - will trap
    
    ; Found - return device address
    mov r8d, eax                ; Slot index
    mov rax, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul r8
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add rcx, rax
    
    mov rax, [rcx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.DeviceAddress]
    
    ; Update access time
    push rax
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov [rcx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.LastAccessTime], rax
    pop rax
    
    jmp GetPtrExit
    
NotResident:
    ; Return YTFN_SENTINEL - accessing this will trap
    mov rax, YTFN_SENTINEL_BASE
    or rax, rbx                 ; Encode layer index in low bits
    
    ; NOTE: When GPU accesses this, YTFN_SENTINEL_Handler will:
    ; 1. Catch the access violation
    ; 2. Extract layer index
    ; 3. Load layer synchronously
    ; 4. Return valid pointer via context modification
    
GetPtrExit:
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
    
InvalidParam2:
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
QuadBuffer_GetLayerPtr ENDP

;==============================================================================
; PUBLIC API: QuadBuffer_NotifyLayerComplete
; Notify that GPU finished computing layer
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_NotifyLayerComplete PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = instance
    mov ebx, edx                ; EBX = layer index
    
    ; Find slot
    mov ecx, ebx
    mov rdx, r12
    call QuadBuffer_FindLayerSlot
    
    test rax, rax
    js NotifyExit               ; Not found - ignore
    
    mov r8d, eax                ; R8 = slot index
    
    ; Get slot pointer
    mov rax, SIZEOF QB_SLOT
    mul r8
    lea rbx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.Slots]
    add rbx, rax                ; RBX = slot
    
    ; Transition to READY (allowing eviction)
    lea rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    cmp DWORD PTR [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_COMPUTING
    jne @F
    
    mov DWORD PTR [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.State], STATE_READY
    
@@:
    lea rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.StateLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Post to IOCP for background prefetch
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOCP]
    mov rdx, IOCP_KEY_GPU_COMPLETE
    xor r8d, r8d
    ; OVERLAPPED with layer info
    lea r9, [rbx+OFFSET QB_SLOT.CurrentOverlapped]
    mov DWORD PTR [r9+OFFSET QB_OVERLAPPED.LayerIndex], ebx
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_PostQueuedCompletionStatus]
    
NotifyExit:
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
QuadBuffer_NotifyLayerComplete ENDP

;==============================================================================
; PUBLIC API: QuadBuffer_Destroy
; Cleanup and free QuadBuffer instance
;==============================================================================
QuadBuffer_Destroy PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov rbx, rcx                ; RBX = instance
    test rbx, rbx
    jz DestroyExit
    
    ; Signal shutdown
    mov DWORD PTR [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.ShutdownRequested], 1
    
    ; Post shutdown message to IOCP
    mov rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOCP]
    mov rdx, IOCP_KEY_SHUTDOWN
    xor r8d, r8d
    xor r9d, r9d
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_PostQueuedCompletionStatus]
    
    ; Wait for I/O thread
    mov rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOThread]
    mov edx, 5000               ; 5 second timeout
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_WaitForSingleObject]
    
    ; Close handles
    mov rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOThread]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    mov rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hShutdownEvent]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    mov rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hIOCP]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    mov rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.hModelFile]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    ; Free buffers
    mov rcx, [rbx+OFFSET QB_INSTANCE.HostBaseAddress]
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @F
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, MEM_RELEASE
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_VirtualFree]
    
@@:
    ; Restore old exception filter
    mov rcx, g_OldExceptionFilter
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_SetUnhandledExceptionFilter]
    
    xor rax, rax
    mov g_QBInstance, rax
    
    ; Free instance memory
    mov rcx, rbx
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, MEM_RELEASE
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_VirtualFree]
    
DestroyExit:
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 40
    pop rbx
    ret
QuadBuffer_Destroy ENDP

memset PROC
```

```asm
    pop r14
```

```glsl
#version 460 core

// RawrXD NF4 Decompression Compute Shader
// Decompresses 4-bit Normal Float weights to FP16/FP32

layout(local_size_x = 256, local_size_y = 1, local_size_z = 1) in;

// NF4 quantization levels (normalized float)
// These are the standard NF4 bucket values
const float NF4_TABLE[16] = float[](
    -1.0, -0.6961928009986877, -0.5250730514526367, 
    -0.39491748809814453, -0.28444138169288635, -0.18477343022823334,
    -0.09105003625154495, 0.0, 0.07958029955625534, 0.16093020141124725,
    0.24611230194568634, 0.33791524171829224, 0.44070982933044434,
    0.5626170039176941, 0.7229568362236023, 1.0
);

// Block structure: 64 weights (32 bytes) + 2 byte absmax
struct NF4Block {
    uint data[8];       // 32 bytes of packed 4-bit weights
    float16_t absmax;   // Scale factor (FP16)
    float16_t padding;  // Alignment
};

layout(std430, binding = 0) readonly buffer InputWeights {
    NF4Block blocks[];
} input_weights;

layout(std430, binding = 1) writeonly buffer OutputWeights {
    float16_t weights[];  // Or float for FP32 output
} output_weights;

layout(std430, binding = 2) uniform ThetaUniform {
    float theta;        // Live-updatable rotary embedding theta
    uint layer_id;      // Current layer for positional encoding
    uint head_dim;      // Attention head dimension
    uint reserved;      // Padding
} params;

// Shared memory for cooperative loading
shared NF4Block shared_blocks[256];

// Decompress single weight from packed 4-bit
float decompress_weight(uint packed_val, uint nibble_idx, float absmax) {
    uint nibble = (packed_val >> (nibble_idx * 4)) & 0xF;
    float normalized = NF4_TABLE[nibble];
    return normalized * float(absmax);
}

void main() {
    uint global_idx = gl_GlobalInvocationID.x;
    uint local_idx = gl_LocalInvocationID.x;
    uint block_idx = global_idx / 64;  // 64 weights per block
    uint weight_in_block = global_idx % 64;
    
    // Cooperative load of block into shared memory
    if (weight_in_block < 8) {
        // Each thread loads part of the block
        uint addr = block_idx + (weight_in_block < 4 ? 0 : 1);
        if (addr < input_weights.blocks.length()) {
            shared_blocks[local_idx] = input_weights.blocks[addr];
        }
    }
    
    barrier();
    memoryBarrierShared();
    
    // Decompress this thread's weight
    uint word_idx = weight_in_block / 8;
    uint nibble_idx = (weight_in_block % 8) / 2;
    uint sub_nibble = weight_in_block % 2;  // High or low nibble in 8-bit byte
    
    NF4Block block = shared_blocks[local_idx];
    uint packed = block.data[word_idx];
    
    // Extract correct nibble (4 bits)
    uint nibble = sub_nibble == 0 ? 
        (packed >> (nibble_idx * 8)) & 0xF :
        (packed >> (nibble_idx * 8 + 4)) & 0xF;
    
    float dequantized = NF4_TABLE[nibble] * float(block.absmax);
    
    // Apply live theta (rotary embedding adjustment)
    // This allows real-time experimentation with RoPE theta
    if (params.theta != 0.0) {
        uint pos = params.layer_id;  // Simplified position
        float angle = float(pos) * pow(params.theta, 
            float(weight_in_block % int(params.head_dim)) / float(params.head_dim));
        
        // Apply rotation (simplified)
        float cos_val = cos(angle);
        float sin_val = sin(angle);
        dequantized = dequantized * cos_val;  // Simplified, real RoPE is 2D rotation
    }
    
    // Write output
    output_weights.weights[global_idx] = float16_t(dequantized);
}
```

```cpp
    class LayerComputation {
        QuadBuffer& buffer_;
        uint32_t layer_;
        bool active_;
        
    public:
        LayerComputation(QuadBuffer& buffer, uint32_t layer)
            : buffer_(buffer), layer_(layer), active_(true) {}
        
        ~LayerComputation() {

                buffer_.NotifyLayerComplete(layer_);
            }
        }
        
        // Get GPU pointer (triggers load if needed)
        void* GetPointer() {

        return LayerComputation(*this, layer);

private:
    static uint16_t FloatToHalf(float value) {
        // IEEE-754 FP32 to FP16 conversion
        union { float f; uint32_t i; } v = { value };
        uint32_t sign = (v.i >> 31) & 0x1;
        uint32_t exp = (v.i >> 23) & 0xFF;
        uint32_t mant = v.i & 0x7FFFFF;
        
        if (exp == 0xFF) {
            // Infinity/NaN
            return (sign << 15) | 0x7C00 | (mant >> 13);
        }
        
        int16_t new_exp = static_cast<int16_t>(exp) - 127 + 15;
        if (new_exp >= 31) {
            // Overflow to infinity
            return (sign << 15) | 0x7C00;
        } else if (new_exp <= 0) {
            // Underflow to zero/subnormal
            if (new_exp < -10) return sign << 15;
            mant = (mant | 0x800000) >> (1 - new_exp);
            return (sign << 15) | (mant >> 13);
        }
        
        return static_cast<uint16_t>(
            (sign << 15) | (new_exp << 10) | (mant >> 13)
        );
    }

class InferenceIterator {
    QuadBuffer& buffer_;
    uint32_t current_layer_;
    uint32_t total_layers_;
    bool use_predictor_;
    
public:
    InferenceIterator(
        QuadBuffer& buffer,
        uint32_t total_layers,
        bool use_predictor = true
    ) : buffer_(buffer), 
        current_layer_(0),
        total_layers_(total_layers),
        use_predictor_(use_predictor) {}
    
    bool HasNext() const {
        return current_layer_ < total_layers_;
    }
    
    void* NextLayer() {
        if (!HasNext()) return nullptr;
        
        uint32_t layer = current_layer_++;
        
        // Check ghost cache first
        void* cached = buffer_.CheckGhostCache(layer);
        if (cached) return cached;
        
        // Get pointer (may trigger trap/load)
        void* ptr = buffer_.GetLayerPtr(layer);
        
        // Notify completion of previous layer to allow eviction
        if (layer > 0) {
            buffer_.NotifyLayerComplete(layer - 1);
        }
        
        // Update predictor for next layer prefetch
        if (use_predictor_ && HasNext()) {
            AttentionStats stats = {};  // Would be filled from GPU
            int predicted = buffer_.UpdatePredictor(layer, stats);
            // Predictor triggers prefetch internally
        }
        
        return ptr;
    }
    
    void Reset() {
        current_layer_ = 0;
    }
};
```

```asm
; Heartbeat

HB_TIMEOUT_MS           EQU 500
HB_MAX_MISSES           EQU 3
HB_MAX_NODES            EQU 128

; Conflict Detection
CD_SCAN_INTERVAL_MS     EQU 50
CD_MAX_RESOURCES        EQU 1024
CD_MAX_WAIT_EDGES       EQU 4096

; Task Scheduler
TS_MAX_WORKERS          EQU 64
TS_GLOBAL_QUEUE_SIZE    EQU 10000
TS_LOCAL_QUEUE_SIZE     EQU 256
TS_MAX_TASKS            EQU 100000

; Thread priorities
THREAD_PRIORITY_IDLE            EQU -15
THREAD_PRIORITY_LOWEST          EQU -2
THREAD_PRIORITY_BELOW_NORMAL    EQU -1
THREAD_PRIORITY_NORMAL          EQU 0
THREAD_PRIORITY_ABOVE_NORMAL    EQU 1
THREAD_PRIORITY_HIGHEST         EQU 2
THREAD_PRIORITY_TIME_CRITICAL   EQU 15

; Wait timeouts
INFINITE                EQU 0FFFFFFFFh
WAIT_OBJECT_0           EQU 0
WAIT_TIMEOUT            EQU 102h
WAIT_FAILED             EQU 0FFFFFFFFh

; Error codes
ERROR_SUCCESS           EQU 0
ERROR_OUTOFMEMORY       EQU 0Eh
ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER EQU 57h
ERROR_TIMEOUT           EQU 5B4h

; Cache line size
CACHE_LINE_SIZE         EQU 64

;==============================================================================
; DATA STRUCTURES (412 LOC)
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; HEARTBEAT_NODE - Per-node heartbeat tracking (128 bytes, cache-aligned)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HEARTBEAT_NODE STRUCT ALIGN(CACHE_LINE_SIZE)
    NodeId              DWORD ?         ; Unique node identifier
    State               DWORD ?         ; 0=HEALTHY, 1=SUSPECT, 2=DEAD
    LastHeartbeatTime   QWORD ?         ; QPC timestamp of last heartbeat
    ConsecutiveMisses   DWORD ?         ; Count of missed heartbeats
    TotalMisses         DWORD ?         ; Lifetime miss count
    TotalReceived       DWORD ?         ; Lifetime received count
    AvgLatencyNs        QWORD ?         ; Average response latency
    Callback            QWORD ?         ; State change callback
    CallbackContext     QWORD ?         ; User data for callback
    IpAddress           DWORD ?         ; IPv4 address (or IPv6 mapped)
    Port                WORD ?          ; UDP port
    Padding             WORD ?          ; Alignment
    Reserved            QWORD 4 DUP (?) ; Future expansion
HEARTBEAT_NODE ENDS
SIZEOF_HEARTBEAT_NODE EQU 128

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; HEARTBEAT_MONITOR - Heartbeat subsystem state
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HEARTBEAT_MONITOR STRUCT
    ; Configuration
    CheckIntervalMs     DWORD ?         ; How often to check (100ms)
    TimeoutThresholdMs  DWORD ?         ; When to mark suspect (500ms)
    MaxMisses           DWORD ?         ; Before marking dead (3)
    NodeCount           DWORD ?         ; Currently tracked nodes
    
    ; State
    Nodes               HEARTBEAT_NODE HB_MAX_NODES DUP (<>)
    MonitorThread       QWORD ?         ; Handle to monitor thread
    ShutdownEvent       QWORD ?         ; Signal to stop monitoring
    IsRunning           DWORD ?         ; Boolean
    
    ; Statistics
    TotalHeartbeatsSent QWORD ?
    TotalHeartbeatsRcvd QWORD ?
    TotalStateChanges   QWORD ?
    
    ; Synchronization
    Lock                SRWLOCK <>
HEARTBEAT_MONITOR ENDS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CONFLICT_ENTRY - Resource contention tracking (256 bytes)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONFLICT_ENTRY STRUCT
    ResourceId          QWORD ?         ; Unique resource identifier
    OwnerThreadId       DWORD ?         ; Current owner (0 = free)
    WaiterCount         DWORD ?         ; Number of threads waiting
    WaiterThreadIds     DWORD 16 DUP (?) ; Max 16 waiters per resource
    LockCount           DWORD ?         ; Recursive lock count
    AcquisitionTime     QWORD ?         ; When acquired (QPC)
    TotalContentions    QWORD ?         ; Lifetime contention count
    MaxWaitTimeNs       QWORD ?         ; Worst-case wait time
    ResourceName        BYTE 64 DUP (?) ; Debug name
    Padding             BYTE 56 DUP (?) ; Align to 256 bytes
CONFLICT_ENTRY ENDS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CONFLICT_DETECTOR - Deadlock detection subsystem
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONFLICT_DETECTOR STRUCT
    ; Configuration
    ScanIntervalMs      DWORD ?         ; How often to scan (50ms)
    MaxResources        DWORD ?         ; CD_MAX_RESOURCES
    
    ; State
    Resources           CONFLICT_ENTRY CD_MAX_RESOURCES DUP (<>)
    ResourceCount       DWORD ?         ; Registered resources
    DetectorThread      QWORD ?         ; Handle to detector thread
    ShutdownEvent       QWORD ?         ; Signal to stop
    IsRunning           DWORD ?         ; Boolean
    
    ; Wait graph for cycle detection
    WaitGraphEdges      DWORD CD_MAX_WAIT_EDGES DUP (?) ; (waiter << 16) | owner
    EdgeCount           DWORD ?
    
    ; Statistics
    TotalDeadlocksDetected  QWORD ?
    TotalDeadlocksResolved  QWORD ?
    TotalContentions        QWORD ?
    
    ; Synchronization
    Lock                SRWLOCK <>
CONFLICT_DETECTOR ENDS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; TASK - Work unit descriptor (128 bytes)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TASK STRUCT ALIGN(CACHE_LINE_SIZE)
    ; Identification
    TaskId              QWORD ?         ; Unique task ID
    TaskType            DWORD ?         ; User-defined type
    Priority            DWORD ?         ; 0-15 (0 = highest)
    
    ; Function to execute
    Function            QWORD ?         ; Task function pointer
    Context             QWORD ?         ; User context
    ResultBuffer        QWORD ?         ; Where to store result
    
    ; State
    State               DWORD ?         ; 0=PENDING, 1=RUNNING, 2=COMPLETE, 3=CANCELLED
    SubmitTime          QWORD ?         ; QPC when submitted
    StartTime           QWORD ?         ; QPC when started
    CompleteTime        QWORD ?         ; QPC when completed
    WorkerThreadId      DWORD ?         ; Which worker executed
    
    ; Scheduling
    NextTask            QWORD ?         ; Linked list pointer
    PrevTask            QWORD ?         ; Linked list pointer
    
    ; Statistics
    StealCount          DWORD ?         ; How many times stolen
    RetryCount          DWORD ?         ; Retry attempts
    
    Padding             DWORD 6 DUP (?) ; Align to 128
TASK ENDS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; THREAD_CONTEXT - Per-worker state (256 bytes)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
THREAD_CONTEXT STRUCT ALIGN(CACHE_LINE_SIZE)
    ; Identity
    WorkerId            DWORD ?         ; 0-N
    ThreadId            DWORD ?         ; OS thread ID
    ThreadHandle        QWORD ?         ; OS handle
    
    ; Queues
    LocalQueue          QWORD TS_LOCAL_QUEUE_SIZE DUP (?) ; Task pointers
    LocalQueueHead      DWORD ?         ; Push index
    LocalQueueTail      DWORD ?         ; Pop index
    LocalQueueCount     DWORD ?         ; Current occupancy
    
    ; Statistics
    TasksExecuted       QWORD ?
    TasksStolen         QWORD ?
    TasksStolenFrom     QWORD ?         ; Others stole from me
    TotalExecutionTimeNs QWORD ?
    IdleTimeNs          QWORD ?
    
    ; State
    CurrentTask         QWORD ?         ; Currently executing task
    IsRunning           DWORD ?         ; Worker active flag
    Padding             DWORD 9 DUP (?) ; Align to 256
THREAD_CONTEXT ENDS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; TASK_SCHEDULER - Work-stealing scheduler
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TASK_SCHEDULER STRUCT
    ; Configuration
    MaxWorkers          DWORD ?         ; TS_MAX_WORKERS
    MinWorkers          DWORD ?         ; Usually 1
    TargetWorkers       DWORD ?         ; Desired count (usually core count)
    
    ; Workers
    Workers             THREAD_CONTEXT TS_MAX_WORKERS DUP (<>)
    WorkerCount         DWORD ?         ; Currently active
    WorkerMask          QWORD ?         ; Bitmask of active workers
    
    ; Global queue (MPMC)
    GlobalQueue         QWORD TS_GLOBAL_QUEUE_SIZE DUP (?) ; Task pointers
    GlobalQueueHead     QWORD ?         ; 64-bit for ABA protection
    GlobalQueueTail     QWORD ?
    GlobalQueueLock     SRWLOCK <>      ; For slow path
    
    ; Management threads
    CoordinatorThread   QWORD ?         ; Load balancing thread
    ShutdownEvent       QWORD ?         ; Signal to stop
    IsRunning           DWORD ?         ; Boolean
    
    ; Task ID generation
    NextTaskId          QWORD ?
    TaskIdLock          SRWLOCK <>
    
    ; Statistics
    TotalTasksSubmitted QWORD ?
    TotalTasksExecuted  QWORD ?
    TotalTasksStolen    QWORD ?
    TotalStealAttempts  QWORD ?
    
    ; Synchronization
    Lock                SRWLOCK <>
TASK_SCHEDULER ENDS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE - Master context (8KB)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE STRUCT
    ; Magic and version
    Magic               DWORD ?         ; 'W1' (0x5731)
    Version             DWORD ?         ; 0x00010000 (1.0)
    StructureSize       DWORD ?         ; sizeof(WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE)
    Flags               DWORD ?         ; Feature flags
    
    ; Subsystems
    Heartbeat           HEARTBEAT_MONITOR <>
    ConflictDetector    CONFLICT_DETECTOR <>
    Scheduler           TASK_SCHEDULER <>
    
    ; Global state
    Initialized         DWORD ?         ; Boolean
    ShutdownRequested   DWORD ?         ; Boolean
    StartTime           QWORD ?         ; QPC when initialized
    
    ; Thread management
    NextThreadId        DWORD ?         ; Monotonic counter
    ThreadIdLock        SRWLOCK <>
    
    ; Statistics
    TotalThreadsCreated QWORD ?
    TotalThreadsDestroyed QWORD ?
    
    ; Padding to 8KB
    Reserved            BYTE 4096 DUP (?)
WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE ENDS

;==============================================================================
; UTILITY FUNCTIONS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; GetCurrentTimestamp - Get QPC value
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
GetCurrentTimestamp PROC
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 16
    
    lea rcx, [rsp+8]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_QueryPerformanceCounter]
    mov rax, [rsp+8]
    
    add rsp, 16
    pop rbx
    ret
GetCurrentTimestamp ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; MsToQPC - Convert milliseconds to QPC units
; ECX = milliseconds
; Returns RAX = QPC ticks
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsToQPC PROC
    push rbx
    
    ; Load frequency if not cached
    mov rax, g_QPFrequency
    test rax, rax
    jnz @F
    
    sub rsp, 16
    lea rcx, [rsp+8]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_QueryPerformanceFrequency]
    mov rax, [rsp+8]
    mov g_QPFrequency, rax
    add rsp, 16
    
@@: mov rbx, rax              ; RBX = frequency
    
    ; Convert: (ms * frequency) / 1000
    mov eax, ecx              ; EAX = milliseconds
    xor edx, edx
    mul rbx                   ; RDX:RAX = ms * frequency
    mov ecx, 1000
    div rcx                   ; RAX = (ms * freq) / 1000
    
    pop rbx
    ret
MsToQPC ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; AtomicIncrement64 - Lock-free increment
; RCX = pointer to value
; Returns RAX = new value
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AtomicIncrement64 PROC
    mov rax, 1
    lock xadd QWORD PTR [rcx], rax
    inc rax
    ret
AtomicIncrement64 ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; AtomicDecrement64 - Lock-free decrement
; RCX = pointer to value  
; Returns RAX = new value
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AtomicDecrement64 PROC
    mov rax, -1
    lock xadd QWORD PTR [rcx], rax
    dec rax
    ret
AtomicDecrement64 ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; AtomicCompareExchange64 - CAS operation
; RCX = pointer, RDX = expected, R8 = desired
; Returns RAX = actual value (compare with expected for success)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AtomicCompareExchange64 PROC
    mov rax, rdx
    lock cmpxchg QWORD PTR [rcx], r8
    ret
AtomicCompareExchange64 ENDP

;==============================================================================
; HEARTBEAT MONITOR (328 LOC)
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; HeartbeatMonitorThread - Background heartbeat monitoring
; RCX = WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE pointer
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HeartbeatMonitorThread PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 128
    .allocstack 128
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = infrastructure
    lea r13, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Heartbeat] ; R13 = heartbeat monitor
    
    ; Signal that we're running
    mov DWORD PTR [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.IsRunning], 1
    
    ; Debug output
    lea rcx, szHeartbeatStart
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_OutputDebugStringA]
    
MonitorLoop:
    ; Check for shutdown
    mov rcx, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.ShutdownEvent]
    xor edx, edx                ; Timeout 0 (poll)
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_WaitForSingleObject]
    
    cmp eax, WAIT_OBJECT_0
    je MonitorShutdown          ; Shutdown signaled
    
    ; Get current timestamp
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov r14, rax                ; R14 = current time
    
    ; Acquire shared lock for reading
    lea rcx, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.Lock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockShared]
    
    ; Iterate all nodes
    xor ebx, ebx                ; EBX = node index
    mov r15d, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.NodeCount]
    
NodeLoop:
    cmp ebx, r15d
    jge NodesDone
    
    ; Calculate node address
    mov eax, ebx
    mov ecx, SIZEOF_HEARTBEAT_NODE
    mul ecx
    lea rcx, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.Nodes]
    add rcx, rax                ; RCX = current node
    
    ; Check if node is active
    cmp DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.NodeId], 0
    je NextNode                 ; Skip inactive slots
    
    ; Calculate time since last heartbeat
    mov rax, r14
    sub rax, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.LastHeartbeatTime]
    
    ; Convert to milliseconds
    push rax
    mov rbx, g_QPFrequency
    test rbx, rbx
    jnz @F
    push rcx
    lea rcx, g_QPFrequency
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_QueryPerformanceFrequency]
    pop rcx
    mov rbx, g_QPFrequency
@@: pop rax
    xor rdx, rdx
    mul rax, 1000
    div rbx                     ; RAX = milliseconds since last heartbeat
    
    ; Check against thresholds
    cmp DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.State], 0  ; HEALTHY?
    jne CheckSuspect
    
    ; Currently HEALTHY - check if should become SUSPECT
    cmp eax, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.TimeoutThresholdMs]
    jb NextNode                 ; Still healthy
    
    ; Transition to SUSPECT
    mov DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.State], 1  ; SUSPECT
    inc DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.ConsecutiveMisses]
    inc QWORD PTR [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.TotalStateChanges]
    
    ; Invoke callback if registered
    mov rax, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.Callback]
    test rax, rax
    jz NextNode
    
    ; Call: callback(context, node_id, old_state, new_state)
    push rcx
    mov r8d, 0                  ; Old state: HEALTHY
    mov r9d, 1                  ; New state: SUSPECT
    mov edx, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.NodeId]
    mov rcx, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.CallbackContext]
    call rax
    pop rcx
    
    jmp NextNode
    
CheckSuspect:
    cmp DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.State], 1  ; SUSPECT?
    jne NextNode
    
    ; Check if should become DEAD
    inc DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.ConsecutiveMisses]
    mov eax, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.ConsecutiveMisses]
    cmp eax, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.MaxMisses]
    jb NextNode                 ; Still suspect
    
    ; Transition to DEAD
    mov DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.State], 2  ; DEAD
    inc QWORD PTR [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.TotalStateChanges]
    
    ; Invoke callback
    mov rax, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.Callback]
    test rax, rax
    jz NextNode
    
    push rcx
    mov r8d, 1                  ; Old state: SUSPECT
    mov r9d, 2                  ; New state: DEAD
    mov edx, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.NodeId]
    mov rcx, [rcx+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.CallbackContext]
    call rax
    pop rcx
    
NextNode:
    inc ebx
    jmp NodeLoop
    
NodesDone:
    ; Release shared lock
    lea rcx, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.Lock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockShared]
    
    ; Sleep until next check
    mov ecx, [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.CheckIntervalMs]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_Sleep]
    
    jmp MonitorLoop
    
MonitorShutdown:
    mov DWORD PTR [r13+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.IsRunning], 0
    
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 128
    pop rbx
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
HeartbeatMonitorThread ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; ProcessReceivedHeartbeat - Called when heartbeat received from node
; RCX = infrastructure, EDX = node_id, R8 = timestamp, R9 = latency_ns
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ProcessReceivedHeartbeat PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = infrastructure
    mov ebx, edx                ; EBX = node_id
    
    lea r12, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Heartbeat]
    
    ; Find node by ID
    xor ecx, ecx
FindNode:
    cmp ecx, HB_MAX_NODES
    jge NodeNotFound
    
    mov eax, ecx
    mov edx, SIZEOF_HEARTBEAT_NODE
    mul edx
    lea rax, [r12+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.Nodes+rax]
    
    cmp [rax+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.NodeId], ebx
    je FoundNode
    
    inc ecx
    jmp FindNode
    
FoundNode:
    ; Acquire exclusive lock
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.Lock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Update node state
    mov DWORD PTR [rax+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.State], 0  ; HEALTHY
    mov DWORD PTR [rax+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.ConsecutiveMisses], 0
    mov [rax+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.LastHeartbeatTime], r8
    inc DWORD PTR [rax+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.TotalReceived]
    
    ; Update average latency (EWMA)
    mov rcx, [rax+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.AvgLatencyNs]
    shr rcx, 3                  ; Weight 0.125
    mov rdx, r9
    shr rdx, 3
    add rcx, rdx
    mov [rax+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_NODE.AvgLatencyNs], rcx
    
    inc QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.TotalHeartbeatsRcvd]
    
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET HEARTBEAT_MONITOR.Lock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov eax, 1                  ; Success
    jmp HBExit
    
NodeNotFound:
    xor eax, eax                ; Node not found
    
HBExit:
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
ProcessReceivedHeartbeat ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; ConflictDetectorThread - Background deadlock detection
; RCX = WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE pointer
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ConflictDetectorThread PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 128
    .allocstack 128
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx
    lea r13, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.ConflictDetector]
    
    mov DWORD PTR [r13+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.IsRunning], 1
    
    lea rcx, szConflictStart
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_OutputDebugStringA]
    
DetectorLoop:
    ; Check shutdown
    mov rcx, [r13+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.ShutdownEvent]
    xor edx, edx
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_WaitForSingleObject]
    cmp eax, WAIT_OBJECT_0
    je DetectorShutdown
    
    ; Build wait graph
    mov rcx, r13
    call BuildWaitGraph
    
    ; Detect cycles (deadlocks)
    mov rcx, r13
    call DetectDeadlocks
    
    ; Sleep until next scan
    mov ecx, [r13+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.ScanIntervalMs]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_Sleep]
    
    jmp DetectorLoop
    
DetectorShutdown:
    mov DWORD PTR [r13+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.IsRunning], 0
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 128
    pop rbx
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
ConflictDetectorThread ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; BuildWaitGraph - Construct resource wait graph
; RCX = CONFLICT_DETECTOR pointer
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BuildWaitGraph PROC
    push rbx
    push r12
    push r13
    
    mov r12, rcx
    
    ; Clear existing graph
    mov DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.EdgeCount], 0
    
    ; Iterate all resources
    xor ebx, ebx
    mov r13d, [r12+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.ResourceCount]
    
ResourceLoop:
    cmp ebx, r13d
    jge ResourcesDone
    
    ; Get resource entry
    mov eax, ebx
    mov ecx, SIZEOF CONFLICT_ENTRY
    mul ecx
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.Resources]
    add rcx, rax
    
    ; Check if has owner and waiters
    mov edx, [rcx+OFFSET CONFLICT_ENTRY.OwnerThreadId]
    test edx, edx
    jz NextResource
    
    mov eax, [rcx+OFFSET CONFLICT_ENTRY.WaiterCount]
    test eax, eax
    jz NextResource
    
    ; Add edges: waiter -> owner
    xor esi, esi                ; ESI = waiter index
WaiterLoop:
    cmp esi, [rcx+OFFSET CONFLICT_ENTRY.WaiterCount]
    jge NextResource
    
    ; Get waiter thread ID
    mov edi, [rcx+OFFSET CONFLICT_ENTRY.WaiterThreadIds+rsi*4]
    
    ; Add edge (waiter << 16) | owner
    shl edi, 16
    or edi, edx
    
    ; Store in graph
    mov eax, [r12+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.EdgeCount]
    cmp eax, CD_MAX_WAIT_EDGES
    jae GraphFull
    
    mov [r12+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.WaitGraphEdges+rax*4], edi
    inc DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET CONFLICT_DETECTOR.EdgeCount]
    
    inc esi
    jmp WaiterLoop
    
NextResource:
    inc ebx
    jmp ResourceLoop
    
GraphFull:
ResourcesDone:
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
BuildWaitGraph ENDP

; DetectDeadlocks - DFS cycle detection in wait graph
; RCX = CONFLICT_DETECTOR pointer
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DetectDeadlocks PROC
    ret                         ; Stub - full implementation would do DFS
DetectDeadlocks ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; SchedulerCoordinatorThread - Load balancing and coordination
; RCX = WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE pointer
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SchedulerCoordinatorThread PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14

; WorkerThreadProc - Individual worker thread

; PopLocalTask - Pop from worker's local queue
; RCX = THREAD_CONTEXT pointer
; Returns RAX = task pointer or NULL
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PopLocalTask PROC
    mov edx, [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueTail]
    cmp edx, [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueHead]
    je QueueEmpty               ; Tail == head, empty
    
    ; Get task at tail
    mov rax, [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueue+rdx*8]
    
    ; Increment tail (circular buffer)
    inc edx
    and edx, TS_LOCAL_QUEUE_SIZE-1
    mov [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueTail], edx
    
    dec DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueCount]
    ret

    xor eax, eax
    ret

; RCX = THREAD_CONTEXT pointer (this worker)

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
StealTask PROC

    push r13
    push r14

StealFailed:
    xor eax, eax
    pop r14
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
```
